title: Secure User Record
description: Schema for storing sensitive user information with robust security features.

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user (e.g., MongoDB ObjectId).

email.description: User's email address, must be unique and valid.

password_hash.description: argon2id or bcrypt hash of the user's password.

salt.description: Cryptographically secure random salt used for password hashing.

is_active.description: Status indicating if the user account is active.

roles.description: List of roles assigned to the user.

last_login_at.description: Timestamp of the user's last successful login.

failed_login_attempts.description: Count of consecutive failed login attempts.

lockout_until.description: Timestamp until which the account is locked, if applicable.

mfa_enabled.description: Flag indicating if Multi-Factor Authentication is enabled.

mfa_secret.description: Encrypted MFA secret for TOTP, only present if MFA is enabled.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the user record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user record.

audit_log.description: Immutable log of significant actions related to the user account.
